# ComplicationRenderingMode.fullColor

**Case**

The system renders the complication in full color.

## Declaration

```swift
case fullColor
```

## Rendering Modes

- **ComplicationRenderingMode.tinted**: The system renders the complication as a tinted complication.

items.description: The system renders the complication as a tinted complication.
